Why Participate

Why Companies Should Join

01
Brand Visibility
Company logos appear on team jerseys, venue branding, and digital media coverage, providing strong visibility within the corporate community.
02
Employee Engagement
Competing together strengthens teamwork, communication, and overall team morale outside the workplace environment.
03
Professional Networking
Connect with business leaders from various industries across Brunei in a relaxed, competitive sporting environment.
04
Professional Event
Managed by professional referees and experienced tournament officials following a World Cup–style competition format.
What's Included

Corporate Package

BND 950
👕
Official Jersey
Pitch Classic World Cup Series jersey with your company logo, representing your assigned FIFA World Cup 2026 nation.
📺
Media Presence
Live streaming of selected matches and coverage across Pitch Sport's social media platforms with match highlights.
🏟️
Venue Branding
Corporate banners and branding materials displayed throughout the tournament venue for maximum visibility.
🏆
Prizes & Awards
Cash prizes, trophies and medals for top 3 teams. Individual awards for Top Scorer, Best Player and Best Goalkeeper.
⚽
Pro Organisation
Professional referees, structured scheduling and experienced tournament management from group stage to finals.

Team Registration

Register Your Team

Complete all sections accurately. Registrations close May 3rd, 2026.

1
Company
2
Officials
3
Players
4
Declare
5
Done
Section 1 — Company Details
Country Selection
🌍 Each team represents a FIFA World Cup 2026 nation. Select up to 3 choices in order of preference. The Official Country Draw on May 8th, 2026 will confirm your assigned country.
Section 2 — Team Officials
👔 Maximum 5 officials per team. At least 1 official is required. Officials must be properly attired on the bench — slippers and sandals are strictly prohibited. Officials' jerseys (up to 5 sets) are included in the registration fee.
Section 3 — Player Registration
📋 Player Registration Rules
Max 12players total per team
Min 2staff players — must be employees of the registering company. Proof of employment required.
Max 6non-staff (import) players — non-company staff, local or foreign. Max 6 across the squad.
JerseyAll jersey numbers must be unique. Numbers must be worn consistently throughout the tournament.
NoteAny player registered under more than one team will be disqualified unless one team is confirmed before the tournament starts.
Total: 0 / 12
Staff: 0 (min 2)
Non-staff: 0 / 6
Staff Players
Company employees · Minimum 2 required
Min 2 · No max
Non-Staff Players
Import players · Not employed by company · Max 6
Max 6
